languages.text: Взор Ангела Императора полон немого осуждения — за то, что вы не спасли от позорной участи.
The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.
languages.original_text: Взор Ангела Императора полон немого осуждения — за то, что вы не спасли от позорной участи.

traits.locale_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.
The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.
The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

languages.text: 帝皇的天使目光中满是无声的谴责，仿佛在指责你未能让他免于屈辱的结局。
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: 帝皇的天使目光中满是无声的谴责，仿佛在指责你未能让他免于屈辱的结局。

languages.text: La mirada del ángel del Emperador está llena de condena silenciosa. Sientes que te juzga por no haberle evitado un ignominioso final.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: La mirada del ángel del Emperador está llena de condena silenciosa. Sientes que te juzga por no haberle evitado un ignominioso final.

languages.text: L'ange de l'Empereur vous adresse un regard empli d'une rancœur muette. Il vous blâme d'avoir échoué à le sauver d'une fin déshonorante.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: L'ange de l'Empereur vous adresse un regard empli d'une rancœur muette. Il vous blâme d'avoir échoué à le sauver d'une fin déshonorante.

languages.text: İmparator'un Meleği'nin bakışları, onu utanç verici bir sondan kurtaramadığın için seni yargılayan sessiz bir kınamayla dolu.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: İmparator'un Meleği'nin bakışları, onu utanç verici bir sondan kurtaramadığın için seni yargılayan sessiz bir kınamayla dolu.

languages.text: Der Blick des Engels des Imperators ist ein stiller Vorwurf, weil du ihn nicht vor einem schmachvollen Ende bewahren konntest.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: Der Blick des Engels des Imperators ist ein stiller Vorwurf, weil du ihn nicht vor einem schmachvollen Ende bewahren konntest.

languages.text: 天皇の視線は、あなたの失敗を静かに非難する。恥辱的な最期を免れることができなかったあなたを。
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor's gaze is full of silent condemnation, judging you for your failure to save him from a disgraceful end.

traits.locale_text: 天皇の視線は、あなたの失敗を静かに非難する。恥辱的な最期を免れることができなかったあなたを。
